getting-started.title: Getting Started
getting-started.content:
Getting Started
How to Add Notes

Create .md files in the content/ folder
Add frontmatter (title, tags, etc.) at the top of each file
Use Obsidian-style wikilinks: [[page-name]]
Commit and push to trigger auto-deployment

Folder Structure
content/
├── index.md          # Homepage
├── getting-started.md # This page
├── notes/            # Your notes folder
│   ├── note-1.md
│   └── note-2.md
└── ...

Supported Syntax
Wikilinks

[[page-name]] - Link to another page
[[page-name|Display Text]] - Link with custom text
[[page-name#heading|heading]] - Link to a specific heading

Tags
Add tags in frontmatter:
---
tags:
  - tag1
  - tag2
---
Callouts


                  
                  Note
                  
                

This is a callout, just like in Obsidian!




                  
                  Tip
                  
                

You can use all Obsidian callout types: note, tip, warning, danger, etc.


Local Development
npx quartz build --serve
This starts a local server at http://localhost:8080 for previewing your site.

index.title: Welcome
index.content:
Welcome to Obsidian Site
This is a self-hosted Obsidian publish site powered by Quartz 4.
Features

Wikilinks: Link between notes using [[note-name]] syntax
Backlinks: See which notes link to the current page
Graph View: Visualize connections between notes
Full-text Search: Press Ctrl + K to search
Tags: Organize notes with tags
Dark Mode: Toggle between light and dark themes

Getting Started
Check out the Getting Started guide to learn how to add your own notes.
